overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in an indoor corridor with masked characters, ascending a staircase, and emerging into a vibrant neon-lit urban plaza with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The camera explores the futuristic city streets at night, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

exiting the initial room into a narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: observing three masked characters near the service counter before turning to exit the room

small digital screen showing information near the door

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit indoor service area with a counter window looking out to a neon-lit street. Three characters wearing distinctive masks stand near the counter - one with green hair dances while another with a red mask gestures. The camera begins turning left to exit the room, passing colorful wall stickers.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor corridor with vending machines and digital advertisements

events.description: turning right corner in the corridor
passing under brighter fluorescent ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: walking through an empty corridor lined with vending machines and glowing advertisement screens

entered.detail: tall vending machine with illuminated beverage display
metal security gate with mesh covering a window
multiple glowing screens displaying animated advertisements
red and silver vending machine for snacks
metal elevator doors with call buttons

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow indoor corridor with purple and green walls, passing vending machines and glowing digital advertisement screens. The space is empty of people, with debris scattered on the carpeted floor. The corridor turns past a metal security gate and elevator doors before approaching a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase with red carpet and illuminated handrails

events.description: approaching exit door with bright light visible from outside

agents.ego_description: climbing a long staircase with red carpet, passing digital billboards and vending machines

entered.detail: long staircase with plush red carpet covering the steps
illuminated gold-colored handrail running along the left side
large screen displaying 'CONNECT' advertisement with purple text
vertical screen showing a face with cybernetic implants
red vending machine labeled 'Insta-Food' with food images

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long staircase covered in red carpet with a glowing gold handrail. Digital billboards line the walls displaying cyberpunk advertisements, while an 'Insta-Food' vending machine sits on the landing. The lighting is dim and green-tinted, creating a moody atmosphere as the camera climbs toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: exiting the building into a vast open plaza with towering neon skyscrapers
turning right to explore the plaza and admire the towering buildings
futuristic vehicles driving past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant city plaza, observing the neon architecture and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking ahead of the camera
group of pedestrians sitting on illuminated benches

entered.detail: massive tower covered in green and purple neon lights with geometric patterns
tall vertical billboard displaying animated cyberpunk advertisements
tree with red foliage illuminated by neon lights
wide outdoor staircase with magenta neon lighting
multiple glowing signs for various shops and restaurants

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the staircase into a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape at night. Towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards and neon lights dominate the skyline. The plaza is moderately populated with pedestrians walking among illuminated benches and cherry blossom trees with red foliage. Futuristic vehicles drive along the street as the camera explores the vibrant urban environment, passing under glowing storefront signs and magenta-lit staircases.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, enclosed service area into a sprawling, neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins in a small room with masked characters and colorful wall stickers, turning left to leave the space and enter a narrow corridor defined by purple and green walls and glowing digital screens. As the camera passes through this empty hallway and beyond a metal security gate, the scene shifts to a long, red-carpeted staircase where dim green lighting and gold handrails lead the way upward. The camera then ascends past digital billboards and vending machines before finally emerging from the enclosure into a breathtaking urban plaza. This transition opens up to a vast night skyline of towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements, with the camera gliding past red-foliage cherry blossom trees and futuristic vehicles under a canopy of magenta lights.
